text: No person required to keep a record or make a report under this chapter shall wilfully fail, refuse, or neglect to comply with this chapter.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 4. SPECIAL ANTITHEFT LAWS [10500 - 10904]
### Chapter 2. Reports of Stored Vehicles [10650 - 10658]
##### § 10655

No person required to keep a record or make a report under this chapter shall wilfully fail, refuse, or neglect to comply with this chapter.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: No person required to keep a record or make a report under this chapter shall wilfully fail, refuse, or neglect to comply with this chapter.
